"Approved"}, "entity_id": "{{new.id}}", "entity_name": "service_reports", "entity_schema": "blueprint"}, "priority": 10}, "conditions": {"type": "AND", "rules": [{"field": "new.stage_id", "value": "Submitted", "operator": "equals"}, {"field": "esm.updated_at", "value": 1, "operator": "hours_ago"}]}, "description": "Automatically approve service reports if no action taken within 1 hour", "check_frequency": "*/15 * * * *", "monitored_stages": ["Submitted"], "time_threshold_hours": 1, "applies_to_categories": ["*"]}], "automations": {"on_stage_entry": {"Approved": {"actions": [{"name": "Update Ticket Based on Completion Status", "config": {"payload": {"details": {"auto_approved": "{{new.details->auto_approved}}", "service_report_approved_at": "{{NOW()}}"}, "stage_id": "{{#if (new.details->completion_status == 'paid_activity')}}Invoiced{{else if (new.details->completion_status == 'awaiting_parts')}}Parts Pending{{else if (new.details->completion_status == 'observation')}}Observing{{else}}Resolved{{/if}}", "resolved_at": "{{NOW()}}"}, "entity_id": "{{new.parent_entity_id}}", "entity_name": "tickets", "entity_schema": "blueprint"}, "priority": 10, "action_type": "update_entity"}, {"name": "Create Invoice for Paid Activity", "config": {"payload": {"name": "Invoice for {{new.parent_entity_id.display_id}}", "details": {"task_id": "{{new.task_id}}", "due_date": "{{#addDays NOW 30}}", "line_items": "{{new.details->line_items}}", "service_date": "{{new.details->service_date}}", "total_amount": "{{new.details->total_amount}}", "service_report_id": "{{new.id}}"}, "stage_id": "Draft", "account_id": "{{new.account_id}}", "organization_id": "{{new.organization_id}}", "parent_entity_id": "{{new.parent_entity_id}}", "parent_entity_type": "tickets"}, "condition": "new.details->completion_status == 'paid_activity'", "entity_name": "invoices", "entity_schema": "blueprint"}, "priority": 20, "action_type": "create_entity"}, {"name": "Complete Parent Task", "config": {"payload": {"stage_id": "Completed", "completed_at": "{{NOW()}}"}, "entity_id": "{{new.task_id}}", "entity_name": "tasks", "entity_schema": "blueprint"}, "priority": 30, "action_type": "update_entity"}, {"name": "Start Observation Period if Needed", "config": {"payload": {"details": {"observation_started_at": "{{NOW()}}", "observation_period_hours": "{{new.details->observation_hours}}"}, "stage_id": "Observing"}, "condition": "new.details->completion_status == 'observation'", "entity_id": "{{new.parent_entity_id}}", "entity_name": "tickets", "entity_schema": "blueprint"}, "priority": 40, "action_type": "update_entity"}]}, "Rejected": {"actions": [{"name": "Notify Technician of Rejection", "config": {"data": {"report_id": "{{new.display_id}}", "ticket_id": "{{new.parent_entity_id.display_id}}", "rejection_reason": "{{new.details->rejection_notes}}"}, "subject": "Service Report Rejected for {{new.parent_entity_id.display_id}}", "recipients": {"to": {"sources": [{"id": "{{new.assignee_id}}", "type": "user"}]}}, "template_id": "SR_REJECTED"}, "priority": 10, "action_type": "send_notification"}]}, "Submitted": {"actions": [{"name": "Notify Manager for Approval", "config": {"data": {"report_id": "{{new.display_id}}", "ticket_id": "{{new.parent_entity_id.display_id}}", "technician_name": "{{new.assignee_id.name}}", "auto_approval_time": "1 hour"}, "subject": "Service Report Submitted for {{new.parent_entity_id.display_id}}", "recipients": {"to": {"sources": [{"id": "{{new.assignee_id.manager_id}}", "type": "user"}]}}, "template_id": "SR_APPROVAL_PENDING"}, "priority": 10, "action_type": "send_notification"}]}}}, "entity_type": "service_reports", "entity_schema": "blueprint", "blueprint_type": "lifecycle"}

name: High Precision Timesheet Approval
definition: {"name": "High Precision Timesheet Approval", "lifecycle": {"stages": [{"id": "Draft", "name": "Draft", "category": "NEW"}, {"id": "Submitted", "name": "Submitted", "category": "IN_PROGRESS"}, {"id": "Approved", "name": "Approved", "category": "CLOSED_WON"}, {"id": "Rejected", "name": "Rejected", "category": "CLOSED_LOST"}], "transitions": [{"id": "T_SUBMIT", "to": "Submitted", "from": "Draft"}, {"id": "T_APPROVE", "to": "Approved", "from": "Submitted", "name": "Approve Timesheet"}, {"id": "T_REJECT", "to": "Rejected", "from": "Submitted", "name": "Reject Timesheet"}, {"id": "T_REOPEN", "to": "Draft", "from": "Rejected"}], "startStateId": "Draft"}, "sla_rules": [{"id": "TIMESHEET_APPROVAL_SLA", "name": "Timesheet Approval SLA (48h)", "action": {"name": "Notify Manager of Overdue Timesheet", "type": "send_email", "config": {"subject": "URGENT: Timesheet {{new.display_id}} Approval Overdue", "recipients": {"to": {"sources": [{"id": "{{new.owner_id.manager_id}}", "type": "user"}]}}, "template_id": "TASK_OVERDUE"}, "priority": 10}, "description": "Timesheets must be approved within 48 hours of submission", "check_frequency": "0 0 * * *", "monitored_stages": ["Submitted"], "time_threshold_hours": 48}], "automations": {"on_stage_entry": {"Approved": {"actions": [{"type": "RPC", "config": {"rpc": "workforce.proc_timesheet_reconcile_usage", "args": {"p_timesheet_id": "{{id}}"}}}]}, "Rejected": {"actions": [{"type": "RPC", "config": {"rpc": "workforce.util_ledger_reverse", "args": {"p_ref_key": "timesheet_id", "p_ref_value": "{{id}}", "p_table_name": "timesheet_ledger"}}}]}}}, "entity_type": "timesheets", "entity_schema": "workforce", "blueprint_type": "approval"}

"preventive_maintenance"]}, {"to": "In_Progress", "from": ["To_Do", "Scheduled"], "label": "Start Work", "trigger": "manual", "applies_to_categories": ["*"]}, {"to": "Completed", "from": ["In_Progress", "Scheduled"], "label": "Complete", "trigger": "manual", "applies_to_categories": ["*"]}, {"to": "No_Contact", "from": "In_Progress", "label": "Mark No Contact", "trigger": "manual", "applies_to_categories": ["crm_activity"]}, {"to": "Failed", "from": "In_Progress", "label": "Mark Failed", "trigger": "manual", "applies_to_categories": ["work_order", "preventive_maintenance"]}, {"to": "On_Hold", "from": ["To_Do", "Scheduled", "In_Progress"], "label": "Put on Hold", "trigger": "manual", "applies_to_categories": ["*"]}, {"to": "Blocked", "from": ["To_Do", "Scheduled", "In_Progress"], "label": "Mark Blocked", "trigger": "manual", "applies_to_categories": ["*"]}, {"to": "In_Progress", "from": ["On_Hold", "Blocked"], "label": "Resume", "trigger": "manual", "applies_to_categories": ["*"]}, {"to": "Cancelled", "from": ["To_Do", "Scheduled", "In_Progress", "On_Hold", "Blocked"], "label": "Cancel", "trigger": "manual", "applies_to_categories": ["*"]}], "startStateId": "To_Do"}, "sla_rules": [{"id": "TASK_OVERDUE", "name": "Task Overdue", "action": {"name": "Notify Overdue Task", "type": "send_email", "config": {"subject": "Task Overdue:
